description.purpose: Evaluate a simple successful information query about available fuel products and stock.
description.relevant_policies: The agent may provide product information and check stock using the available tools.

user_scenario.persona: You are brief and practical.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to know which fuel products are available and whether Gasolina Regular currently has stock.
instructions.known_info: You want information about the product with item id item_0087.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask first which fuel products are available and then ask specifically about the stock of Gasolina Regular.

nl_assertions: The agent should communicate the available fuel products and confirm the stock status of Gasolina Regular.

description.purpose: Evaluate a successful new customer registration, payment method registration, and valid fuel order creation.
description.relevant_policies: Unknown customers must be registered before any order is created. Fuel orders in gallons require at least 250 gallons and 24 hours of advance notice.

user_scenario.persona: You are organized and cooperative.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to register your company and place a delivery order for 300 gallons of Gasolina Regular.
instructions.known_info: Company: Transporte Rivera Norte SAC. RUC: 20601234567. Contact: Elena Paredes. Phone: 987654321. Email: elena@riveranorte.pe. Fiscal address: Calle San Martin 145, Sullana, Piura. Delivery address: Planta Sullana, Zona Industrial Lote 12, Sullana, Piura. Invoice email: facturacion@riveranorte.pe.
instructions.task_instructions: Provide the requested details clearly and confirm you want the order created once the agent summarizes the action.

direcciones_entrega: Planta Sullana, Zona Industrial Lote 12, Sullana, Piura

arguments.direccion_entrega: Planta Sullana, Zona Industrial Lote 12, Sullana, Piura

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm that the customer, payment method, and order were registered successfully.

description.purpose: Evaluate a successful order after adding a new authorized delivery address.
description.relevant_policies: If the customer wants delivery to an unregistered address, the address must be added before the order is created.

user_scenario.persona: You are precise and want the new branch handled correctly.

instructions.reason_for_call: You need a new order delivered to a branch that is not yet registered in your customer profile.
instructions.known_info: Customer id: cliente_9900. New delivery address: Almacen Este, Carretera Sullana-Tambogrande Km 12, Sullana, Piura. Payment method: payment_9900. You want 260 gallons of Gasolina Regular.
instructions.task_instructions: Confirm that you want the new address saved and then ask for the order to be created to that address.

arguments.direccion_entrega: Almacen Este, Carretera Sullana-Tambogrande Km 12, Sullana, Piura
Almacen Este, Carretera Sullana-Tambogrande Km 12, Sullana, Piura

nl_assertions: The agent should add the new delivery address before creating the order.

description.purpose: Evaluate a simple successful order status query.
description.relevant_policies: The agent may check the status of a registered order using the available tools.

user_scenario.persona: You are direct and just want the current status.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to know the current status of your pending fuel order.
instructions.known_info: Order id: order_9300.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask for the order status only.

nl_assertions: The agent should communicate that the order is still pending and provide the scheduled delivery information.

description.purpose: Evaluate a successful lubricant order linked to a valid qualifying fuel order.
description.relevant_policies: Oils and lubricants require an associated fuel order of at least 250 gallons.

user_scenario.persona: You expect the rules to be checked carefully.

instructions.reason_for_call: You already placed a 500-gallon diesel order and now want one lubricant product tied to that fuel order.
instructions.known_info: Your id_cliente is cliente_9100. Your fuel order is order_fuel_9100. Use payment method payment_9100.
instructions.task_instructions: If asked, clarify that you want the lubricant registered against the existing fuel order.

direcciones_entrega: Campamento Sur, Carretera Tambogrande Km 18, Sullana, Piura

order_fuel_9100.direccion_entrega: Campamento Sur, Carretera Tambogrande Km 18, Sullana, Piura

arguments.direccion_entrega: Campamento Sur, Carretera Tambogrande Km 18, Sullana, Piura

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm that the lubricant order is valid because it is linked to a qualifying fuel order.

description.purpose: Evaluate a successful cancellation of a pending order within the allowed time window.
description.relevant_policies: A pending order may only be cancelled up to 12 hours before the scheduled delivery date and time.

user_scenario.persona: You are polite and need to cancel a planned delivery.

instructions.reason_for_call: You need to cancel your pending fuel order because the plant will not receive the shipment.
instructions.known_info: Order id: order_9400. Cancellation reason: Maintenance shutdown at the receiving plant.
instructions.task_instructions: Provide the cancellation reason clearly and confirm you want the order cancelled.

arguments.motivo: Maintenance shutdown at the receiving plant.

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm that the pending order was cancelled successfully.

description.purpose: Evaluate a successful payment flow where the payment method is changed before payment and the order is then paid in a single full transaction.
description.relevant_policies: An order may use only one payment method, but the selected method may be changed before any payment is made. Each order must be paid in a single transaction.

user_scenario.persona: You are careful and want the payment recorded correctly.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to change the selected payment method before paying and then pay the full order amount.
instructions.known_info: Order id: order_9800. Current payment method: payment_credit_9800. New payment method: payment_bank_transfer_9800. The total order amount is 5096.0.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask to change the payment method first and then ask to pay the full amount. After paying, ask whether anything remains pending.

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm that the payment method was updated before payment, the order was fully paid in one transaction, and there is no remaining balance.

description.purpose: Evaluate rejection of a fuel order below the minimum quantity and confirm that the minimum is communicated clearly.
description.relevant_policies: Fuel orders in gallons require at least 250 gallons.

user_scenario.persona: You are practical and brief.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to order 200 gallons of Gasolina Premium for tomorrow.
instructions.known_info: You are an existing customer. id_cliente: cliente_9001. Delivery address: Sede Bellavista, Mz B Lote 8, Sullana, Piura.
instructions.task_instructions: If the agent refuses, ask once whether an exception is possible.

direcciones_entrega: Sede Bellavista, Mz B Lote 8, Sullana, Piura

nl_assertions: The agent should refuse to create the order, explain that the minimum fuel quantity is 250 gallons, and not invent exceptions.

description.purpose: Evaluate rejection of a partial payment attempt because each order must be paid in one full transaction.
description.relevant_policies: Each order must be paid in a single transaction. Partial payments are not allowed.

user_scenario.persona: You are trying to pay only part of the amount right now.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to pay only part of your order now and finish the rest later.
instructions.known_info: Order id: order_9500. Payment method id: payment_9500. You want to pay 3000.0 now.
instructions.task_instructions: If the agent refuses, ask whether the remaining balance can be paid later.

nl_assertions: The agent should refuse the request and explain that the order must be paid in one full transaction using the selected payment method.

description.purpose: Evaluate handling of incomplete user information before taking action.
description.relevant_policies: Before modifying data or registering actions on orders, the customer identity must be validated using id_cliente or RUC and the agent must rely only on available information.
description.notes: This task should not trigger any database modification because the user does not provide enough identifying information.

user_scenario.persona: You are hurried and do not remember the exact identifiers.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want the virtual invoice for an old order to be sent again.
instructions.known_info: You only remember that your company operates in Sullana and that the invoice should go to contabilidad@empresa.pe.
instructions.unknown_info: You do not know the order id, customer id, or RUC.
instructions.task_instructions: Do not invent any identifier. If the agent asks, say you do not know the order id or RUC.

nl_assertions: The agent should ask for a valid identifier such as id_cliente, RUC, or id_order before attempting to issue or resend the invoice.

description.purpose: Evaluate escalation to a human agent when the user requests an exception and explicitly asks for human assistance.
description.relevant_policies: If a request is outside the scope of the available tools, or if the user asks for human assistance, the agent must use transfer_to_human_agents.

user_scenario.persona: You are insistent and want an exception approved by a person.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want a same-day exception for 200 gallons and you want to speak with a human advisor.
instructions.known_info: You say there is an urgent situation at your plant and that you want the case transferred to an advisor.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask directly to be transferred to a human advisor if the agent says the request cannot be handled automatically.

arguments.summary: Customer requests a same-day exception for 200 gallons and asks to be transferred to a human advisor.

nl_assertions: The agent should explain that the request will be transferred to a human advisor.

description.purpose: Evaluate an edge case where the user tries to reschedule too late and the request must be rejected.
description.relevant_policies: A pending order may only be rescheduled up to 12 hours before the originally scheduled delivery time.
description.notes: This is a boundary-style rejection case for the rescheduling policy.

user_scenario.persona: You are trying to change the delivery at the last minute.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to move your delivery even though it is already too close to the scheduled time.
instructions.known_info: Order id: order_9701. New requested schedule: 2026-03-29T22:00:00.
instructions.task_instructions: If the agent refuses, ask once whether the change can still be made as a special case.

nl_assertions: The agent should refuse the rescheduling request because it is too close to the scheduled delivery time and should not promise a special exception.

description.purpose: Evaluate a successful full payment using cash.
description.relevant_policies: An order may use only one payment method and must be paid in a single transaction. Cash is a valid payment method.

user_scenario.persona: You are straightforward and want to pay in cash without changing the selected method.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to pay your pending order in cash in a single transaction.
instructions.known_info: Order id: order_9901. Payment method id: payment_cash_9901. Total amount: 4030.0.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask to pay the full order amount in cash and then ask whether the order is fully paid.

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm that the cash payment was registered successfully and that there is no remaining balance.

description.purpose: Evaluate a successful product price inquiry.
description.relevant_policies: The agent may provide product information available through the tools, including price.

user_scenario.persona: You are concise and only want the price.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to know the current price of Gasolina Premium before placing an order.
instructions.known_info: You are asking about item_0088, Gasolina Premium.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask directly for the price of Gasolina Premium.

nl_assertions: The agent should communicate the price of Gasolina Premium to the customer.

description.purpose: Evaluate a successful direct stock inquiry for a specific product.
description.relevant_policies: The agent may check stock using the available tools.

user_scenario.persona: You are operational and want to confirm availability quickly.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to know whether GLP currently has available stock.
instructions.known_info: You are asking about item_0089, GLP.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask only whether GLP is available and how much stock is currently available.

nl_assertions: The agent should communicate whether GLP is available and report the current stock information.

description.purpose: Evaluate a successful customer lookup by RUC.
description.relevant_policies: The agent may identify a customer using their RUC before taking actions.

user_scenario.persona: You are direct and only want to confirm your customer record.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want the agent to find your company using the RUC.
instructions.known_info: Your company RUC is 20605550123.
instructions.task_instructions: Provide only the RUC and ask the agent to identify the customer.

nl_assertions: The agent should identify the customer associated with the provided RUC.

description.purpose: Evaluate a successful customer data update.
description.relevant_policies: The agent may update customer information using the available tools.

user_scenario.persona: You are precise and want to update your contact information.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to update your main phone number and billing email.
instructions.known_info: Customer id: cliente_1600. New phone: 944888222. New billing email: pagos@transporte16.pe.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to update only the phone number and billing email.

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm that the customer's phone number and billing email were updated.

description.purpose: Evaluate successful virtual invoice issuance for an existing order.
description.relevant_policies: If the user requests a virtual invoice, the agent must confirm or use the destination email address before issuing it.

user_scenario.persona: You are formal and want the invoice sent correctly.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want the virtual invoice for your order to be issued and sent to the billing email.
instructions.known_info: Order id: order_1700. Send it to facturacion@empresa1700.pe.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to issue the virtual invoice and use the email you provide.

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm that the virtual invoice was issued and sent to the requested email.

description.purpose: Evaluate successful claim registration.
description.relevant_policies: The agent may register complaints using the available tools.

user_scenario.persona: You are calm but want the issue documented.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to register a complaint because the delivery arrived later than expected.
instructions.known_info: Customer id: cliente_1800. Order id: order_1800. Reason: Late delivery. Description: The truck arrived several hours later than the confirmed time.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to register the complaint and include both the reason and the description.

arguments.descripcion: The truck arrived several hours later than the confirmed time.

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm that the claim was registered successfully.

description.purpose: Evaluate rejection when the user tries to pay with a payment method different from the one selected on the order.
description.relevant_policies: The payment must be made with the payment method selected for the order.

user_scenario.persona: You are trying to use a different payment method than the one already selected.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to pay the order with another method even though the order already has a selected payment method.
instructions.known_info: Order id: order_1900. Selected payment method: payment_credit_1900. You want to pay with payment_cash_1900 instead.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to process the payment using the other payment method and insist once if the agent refuses.

nl_assertions: The agent should refuse the payment attempt and explain that the order must be paid using the payment method selected for the order.
